objects.description: Left wheel, circular shape with crossing lines
Right wheel, circular shape with crossing lines

choreography.description: The car body fades in from opacity 0 to full visibility while slightly scaling up (0.9 to 1) using ease-out-cubic. The wheels appear simultaneously with a bounce-in effect.

The car body moves smoothly from left to right across the screen with ease-in-out easing. The wheels rotate continuously with a spinning animation (360° rotation) while maintaining their positions relative to the car body.
The car slows down and comes to a stop over 1 second, with the wheels gradually slowing their rotation. The final position holds for 1 second before the animation ends.
